song.title: Open To Your Voice
song.author: Anna Schulz
song.lyrics: [V1] .C F C F I don’t need a symphony,| I don’t need the soothing ocean waves. .C F G Am I just need my ears |to be open to Your voice. |That’s my choice. . Dm F G C I just need my ears,| open to Your voice. .F G C Open to Your voice. [V2] I don’t need some splendid harmonies,| I don’t need a fanfare don’t you see I don’t need wind blowing through the trees,| I don’t need the gentle ocean breeze. Your sweet voice is only what I want to hear and find You near. Lord, I hold Your voice, so very dear. So very dear. [V3] I don’t need a life-long plan I don’t need to know where I’m going I don’t need to see a mile away,| to obey I just need my ears, open to Your voice. Open to Your voice.
